prompt: Modern corporate office with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a city skyline at dusk. Clean desks, a few warm desk lamps, soft ambient lighting. Professional but not sterile. No people. Cinematic wide angle. Editorial corporate photography, cool tones with warm accent lighting.

Overhead view of a strategy meeting table. Scattered documents, a laptop, coffee cups, pens, and sticky notes on a large dark wood table. No people visible, just the artifacts of collaboration. Clean, editorial, slightly desaturated tones. Corporate photography.

Two professionals in a modern glass-walled meeting room, reviewing data on a large screen. Business casual attire. Clean, bright, contemporary office environment. Shallow depth of field. Editorial corporate photography, cool blue-gray tones.

Abstract architectural detail — clean lines of a modern building facade, glass and steel, geometric patterns. Cool blue-gray sky. Minimal, professional, aspirational. No people. Editorial architecture photography.
Close-up of hands drawing on a whiteboard with strategy diagrams and flowcharts. Markers in hand, clean whiteboard. Bright office light. Focused, analytical. Editorial corporate photography.

Laptop screen showing data dashboard with charts and graphs in a clean office setting. Shallow depth of field on the screen. Cool blue tones from the display. Professional, analytical. Editorial corporate photography.

Small team of three professionals gathered around a conference table with documents and laptops. Collaborative energy, natural light from a window. Business casual. Editorial corporate photography, warm natural tones.
Modern office workspace with a standing desk, dual monitors, and organized supplies. Clean, minimal, productive environment. Morning light. No people. Editorial interior photography, neutral tones.
Professional presenting to a small group in a bright modern conference room. Presentation screen visible in background. Engaged audience. Natural light. Editorial corporate photography, warm tones.

Close-up of a notebook with handwritten notes and diagrams next to a cup of coffee on a clean desk. Pen resting on the page. Morning light, shallow depth of field. Thoughtful, strategic. Editorial photography.

Small consulting team of four people in a relaxed office lounge area. Seated on modern furniture, having an informal discussion. Diverse group, business casual. Natural light, warm and authentic atmosphere. Not posed. Editorial corporate portrait photography.

Professional headshot of a man in his late 40s, salt-and-pepper hair, wearing a dark blazer over an open-collar shirt. Confident, approachable smile. Neutral office background in soft focus. Natural lighting. Head and shoulders, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.

Professional headshot of a woman in her early 40s, dark hair, wearing a tailored blazer. Warm, intelligent expression. Neutral office background in soft focus. Natural lighting. Head and shoulders, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.

Professional headshot of a man in his mid-30s, dark skin, closely cropped hair, wearing a crisp white shirt. Friendly, confident expression. Neutral office background in soft focus. Natural lighting. Head and shoulders, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.

Dramatic overhead shot of a city financial district at twilight. Glass skyscrapers reflecting warm sunset light. Urban, ambitious, professional. No people. Editorial architecture photography, warm-to-cool gradient tones.
Modern corporate headquarters exterior — clean glass and steel building, landscaped entrance, dusk lighting. Professional, aspirational. No people. Editorial architecture photography, cool tones.
Busy open-plan office interior with rows of desks, screens, and collaborative spaces. Bright, modern, productive atmosphere. People in soft focus. Editorial corporate photography, neutral tones.
Warehouse or logistics facility interior — organized shelving, clean aisles, modern lighting. Operational efficiency visual. No people. Editorial industrial photography, cool neutral tones.
Aerial view of a modern business campus with multiple buildings, green landscaping, and parking areas. Clean, corporate, expansive. Bright daylight. Editorial aerial photography, neutral tones.
Abstract blurred city lights at night — warm amber and cool blue bokeh circles. Dark background, atmospheric, professional. No discernible buildings or people. Editorial abstract photography.

Minimalist modern office corridor with clean white walls, subtle lighting, and a window at the end showing a bright sky. Professional, forward-looking, aspirational. No people. Editorial architecture photography, bright neutral tones.
Close-up of two professionals shaking hands across a conference table. Shallow depth of field, warm natural lighting. Partnership, trust, deal-closing energy. Editorial corporate photography.
Panoramic view of a modern city skyline at dawn. Glass towers catching early golden light, clear sky. Ambitious, aspirational, fresh start energy. Editorial cityscape photography, warm golden tones.

Abstract geometric pattern of a modern building facade — repeating glass panels and steel beams creating a rhythmic pattern. Cool blue-gray tones, minimal, architectural. Editorial abstract photography.
